headline: Cut the snacking, restart your momentum today
summary: You need -0.60 kg/week but you're at -0.06; today starts the real commitment with zero snacking and structured movement.
details: Today: no emotional eating, stick to Huel and whole foods—no deviations, no 'just one.' Get on the rowing machine for 35 minutes to burn the accumulated surplus from your weekend. This Monday matters because you're 12 days behind schedule; one week at the correct pace (-0.60 kg) gets you 4 days closer to your goal.
